name: Creamy Pepper Dressing
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, whisk together the mayo, milk, water, parmesan cheese, freshly ground pepper, cider vinegar, lemon juice, chopped onion, and garlic salt until well combined.
2. Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes to allow the flavors to meld before serving.
3. This recipe makes approximately 3 cups of dressing.
